subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-10
subcodes.first_line: It will be capital accomplishment if a school conducted on Bahá'í lines could be built. In the Bahá'í movement a system of education is outlined, whose value is not for the present appreciated.... Every little child will have a slate before him on his small desk.
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @methods of teaching the Cause, @education of children; moral education, @excellence; distinction
